name: header-nav-hover
trigger: hover nav links (Features/Reviews/Pricing/FAQs) + Log in / Download buttons
delta: nav links text-gray-700 -> text-gray-900 with rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 px-4 py-2 pill bg; Log in pill hover bg-gray-100; Download solid gray-900 button hover bg-gray-800 active bg-gray-900

name: mobile-nav-popover
trigger: click hamburger (aria-label='Toggle site navigation') below lg
delta: hamburger morphs bars->X; opens white rounded-lg shadow-xl popover panel anchored below header with links Features, Reviews, Pricing, FAQs, hairline divider, Log in; dimmed/blurred backdrop fades in; outside-click/esc closes. Captured mobile-closed.png/mobile-open.png in states-int/.

name: primary-features-tabs
trigger: click one of 3 feature tab buttons on the right (role=tab); also AUTO-ADVANCES on an interval until user interacts
delta: active tab gets bg-gray-800 rounded-2xl highlight; the left phone frame cross-fades to that feature's app screen (1=InviteScreen 'Invite people', 2=StocksScreen 'Stocks', 3=InvestScreen 'Buy $LA'). On mobile (<md) becomes horizontal snap carousel with dot indicators.

name: secondary-features-grid
trigger: static on desktop (3x2 grid of icon+title+desc under 'Now is the time to build your portfolio'); no interaction beyond entrance
delta: no toggle on desktop; entrance only

name: pricing-toggle
trigger: click Monthly / Annually radio (headlessui radiogroup) above pricing cards
delta: active radio gets bg-gray-900 text-white pill (sliding); Investor price $7 (Monthly) <-> $70 (Annually); VIP $199 <-> $1,990; Starter stays $0. Featured 'Investor' card is dark gray-900.

name: reviews-marquee
delta: review cards animate up in staggered columns (framer-motion translateY appear + continuous slow vertical marquee of 3 columns on desktop). 14 reviews cycle. Each card: white rounded-2xl shadow, title (gray-900 font-medium), 5 star icons (cyan-500), body (gray-600), author (@handle gray-500).

name: faqs-grid
trigger: static 3-column grid of Q&A pairs (no accordion)
delta: no interaction; 9 FAQ items in 3 columns
